title: Teen arrested after video of assault on 2 teachers
description: NATIONAL NEWS AND VIDEO - A teenager from a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS AND VIDEO - A teenager from a local high school appeared in Witbank Magistrate’s Court yesterday after an incident where two teachers were pushed off steps in front of the administration office.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS AND VIDEO - A teenager from a local high school appeared in Witbank Magistrate’s Court yesterday after an incident where two teachers were pushed off steps in front of the administration office."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video footage shows the 18-year-old learner pushing one teacher down the steps and then pushing a second teacher who came to her aid on 9 September.","html":"Video footage shows the 18-year-old learner pushing one teacher down the steps and then pushing a second teacher who came to her aid on 9 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“The teen was arrested after police viewed the video, which contradicted the boy and his mother’s attempt to open a case against the teachers,” said police spokesperson Sergeant David Ratau, who is also the Adopt-a-Cop of the school."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The case against the learner has been postponed to 12 November, and he was released on a warning.","html":"The case against the learner has been postponed to 12 November, and he was released on a warning."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In addition to the legal proceedings, the school’s headmaster confirmed a disciplinary hearing for the learner was taking place today.","html":"In addition to the legal proceedings, the school’s headmaster confirmed a disciplinary hearing for the learner was taking place today."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Remember, the learner was not yet found guilty,” he said.","html":"“Remember, the learner was not yet found guilty,” he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"VIDEO: Teen pushes two teachers off steps at eMalahleni high school.","html":"VIDEO: Teen pushes two teachers off steps at eMalahleni high school."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The school’s headmaster said a statement was sent to the Department of Education."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gerald Sambo, communication officer of the Education Department, said a full report will be requested from the district.","html":"Gerald Sambo, communication officer of the Education Department, said a full report will be requested from the district."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article: Caxton Network News","html":"Article: Caxton Network News"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Teen arrested after video of assault on 2 teachers
